symptom: slowly creeping breathlessness over years that felt like just getting unfit
hook: both lungs were filled top to bottom with countless tiny dense grains like a bag of sand poured into the chest
whatYouSee: Lungs filled with countless tiny grains like sand.
whyItMatters: Tiny stones build up in the air sacs over years and slowly stiffen the lungs.
treatment: There is no cure and severe cases may need a lung transplant.
takeaway: Lungs full of tiny sand-like stones is alveolar microlithiasis.
